evidence.claim: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow, Kubeflow, and internal feature stores
evidence.source_text: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow for experiment tracking, Kubeflow for orchestration, and our internal feature store.

evidence.claim: Developed churn prediction model used by customer success team
evidence.source_text: My main project was a churn prediction model that's now used by the customer success team to prioritize outreach.

evidence.claim: Designed model monitoring stack including data drift and prediction distribution checks
evidence.source_text: Designed the model monitoring stack: data drift detection, prediction distribution checks, and alerting.

evidence.claim: Mentored a junior engineer through an end-to-end ML project
evidence.source_text: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project last year.

evidence.claim: Developed semantic search for 500K documents using sentence-transformers and FAISS
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents. Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 initially, later upgraded to bge-base) with FAISS for fast nearest-neighbor retrieval.

evidence.claim: Improved search relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup, validated through human relevance judgments.

evidence.claim: Led migration from keyword-search to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.

evidence.claim: Learns primarily through shipping real systems and production load testing
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Experienced in debugging production ranking issues
evidence.source_text: I've spent enough time debugging production ranking issues to know which signals matter and which are noise.

evidence.claim: Technical proficiency in various ML frameworks and tools
evidence.source_text: Hugging Face Transformers, Computer Vision, gRPC, Time Series, Weaviate, CNN, Deep Learning, TensorFlow, ASR, Embeddings, Tailwind, Reinforcement Learning, LoRA, pgvector, Statistical Modeling, Machine Learning
